name: Score Manager
description: A persistent actor that tracks score via a variable. Custom event AddScore increments and prints the current score. Place once in the level.
blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_ScoreTracker}}
PARENT: Actor

VAR Score: Int = {{initial_score|0}}

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Score Tracker Active"]
NODE n3: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="AddScore"]
NODE n4: GetVar [Variable=Score]
NODE n5: AddFloat [B={{points_per_add|1}}]
NODE n6: SetVar [Variable=Score]
NODE n7: PrintString

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n6.Then -> n7.Execute

DATA n4.Value -> n5.A [Int]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n6.Value [Int]
DATA n5.ReturnValue -> n7.InString [String]

spawn_example.label: ScoreTracker_1
spawn_example.notes: Place above play area — no visual component needed
